nasb.text: For through the anger of the Lord  this came about in Jerusalem and Judah until He cast them out from His presence. And Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.

esv.text: For because of the anger of the Lord it came to the point in Jerusalem and Judah that he cast them out from his presence. And Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華的怒氣向耶路撒冷和猶大發作，直到他把他們從自己的面前趕走。後來，西底家背叛了巴比倫王。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华向耶路撒冷和犹大的人发怒，把他们从祂面前赶走。 后来，西底迦背叛了巴比伦王。
